name: White Chocolate Rasberry Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp sugar and 3 tbs. melted butter (for crust)
1 pint fresh raspberries or unsweetened frozen raspberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix cream cheese, sugar, and flour in a large bowl with a mixer until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, only until blended.
4. Stir in milk and melted white chocolate.
5. Grease the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
6. Pour half of the cheesecake batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with half of the raspberries.
7. Repeat with remaining batter and raspberries, pressing them down to prevent drying out during baking.
8. Bake for 15 minutes at 375°F (190°C), then reduce heat to 235°F (118°C) and continue baking for one hour and thirty minutes or until set.
9. Let cool completely and refrigerate overnight.
10. Remove from pan.
11. For topping, melt semi-sweet chocolate chips with 2 Tbsp Crisco shortening and whip cream with 1 Tbsp powdered sugar.
12. Spread topping over the cooled cake and decorate with chocolate curls and raspberries.
13. If the cheesecake cracks, press together the cracked edges before adding the topping.
14. Chill for at least an hour before serving.
